checksRun.note: combat-scope parity notes only; not progression

topRisks.summary: Prerequisites not re-verified at finalization; backtrack/respec can materialize an illegal grant.
Follower steps write 6 non-schema draftSelections keys, bypassing validation/persistence; displayed follower choices may not materialize.
Triple-mirrored selection state (session + buildIntent + committedSelections) is a drift surface.
Dead second ProgressionSession class (no importers) invites wrong-authority imports.
CREATE-bucket world actors are not rolled back; follower/companion creation can orphan an actor on mid-plan failure.
Steps import registries/DBs directly instead of ProgressionContentAuthority (19 sites).
class_skills/starting_features/starting_credits populated for only 5/37 classes; 32 rely on finalizer fallbacks.
Direct draftSelections writes in survey/droid/template paths skip auto-save (23 sites).

fastestWins: W1: doc-only correction of stale 'partially applied' comment in finalizer (rollback now runs)
W3: add follower keys to session schema and route through commitSelection
W4: add finalization-time prerequisite re-check (addresses R1)
W5: adopt check-progression-integrity.mjs in a check-runner, --strict after burn-down
runtimeVerificationNeeded: Finalization prereq drift after backtrack/respec (R1, smoke #13)
Follower non-schema key consumption by follower adapter (R2, smoke #16)
CREATE-bucket rollback / orphaned follower actor on failure (R5, smoke #12)
Force slot/technique/secret cadence and detail-rail hydration (smoke #5-7)
Rapid-click Confirm under mentor async load (smoke #14)
positiveFindings: Zero direct actor/item mutations in the progression tree (all via ActorEngine).
Transactional rollback exists and is requested by the finalizer.
Dual dedupe (session marker + type::name) prevents double-grant and double-confirm.
isProcessing re-entrancy lock guards Confirm double-click.
Entitlement manifest is read-only; generated once, consumed once per level event.
Class-granted items are locked/non-editable; repeatable Force/talent choices handled correctly.
Droid and nonheroic tracks are fail-closed.
limitations: Static audit; behavioral/ordering/async claims marked runtime-verify.
Finalizer (~3.2k) and shell (~4.1k) mapped by structure + targeted reads, not full line-by-line.
Scanner is regex/line-based; counts are a floor, not a census.
Content semantic correctness (RAW parity per class/level) spot-checked, not exhaustive.
